payload.answer: Do not store: this is a duplicate Slack event delivery context, not a new durable memory.
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice
payload.reason: The input appears to describe a duplicate delivery/retry of the same Slack event rather than a new durable user memory. It is contextual metadata about event delivery and should not be stored as a memory fact.
